= \sum_{k=0}^{\infty} \left[ (k+2)(k+1)a_{k+2} - [k(k-1) + k - n^2]a_k \right] x^k

(1-x^2)y'' - xy' + n^2y = 0 \implies

(k+2)(k+1)a_{k+2} - [k(k-1) + k - n^2]a_k = 0. \quad (k \geq 0).

\implies a_{k+2} = \frac{k^2 - k + k - n^2}{(k+2)(k+1)} a_k = \frac{(k-n)(k+n)}{(k+2)(k+1)} a_k \quad (k \geq 0). \quad a_{n+2} = 0

分为两族， k=2m, k=2m+1, m=0,1,2,3 \cdots

A 假设 n 为偶数.

① k=2m 时

m=1 \quad a_2 = \frac{(0-n)(0+n)}{2 \cdot 1} a_0

m=2 \quad a_4 = \frac{(2-n)(2+n)}{4 \cdot 3} a_2 = \frac{(2-n)(2+n)}{4 \cdot 3} \frac{(0-n)(0+n)}{2 \cdot 1} a_0

m=3 \quad a_6 = \frac{(4-n)(4+n)}{6 \cdot 5} a_4 = \frac{(4-n)(4+n)}{6 \cdot 5} \frac{(2-n)(2+n)}{4 \cdot 3} \frac{(0-n)(0+n)}{2 \cdot 1} a_0

a_{2m} = (-1)^m \cdot \frac{(n)!!}{(n-2m)!!} \cdot \frac{(n+2m-2)!!}{(n-2)!!} \cdot \frac{1}{(2m)!} a_0 \quad (n

= (-1)^m n \cdot \frac{(n+2m-2)!!}{(n-2m)!!} \cdot \frac{1}{(2m)!} a_0 \quad (2m \leq n)

其中 a_n = (-1)^{\frac{n}{2}} n \cdot (n-2)!! \cdot \frac{1}{n!} a_0 \quad (2m=n 时).

再下一个 a_{n+2}=0, 往后全为 0.

a_{2m} = 
\begin{cases} 
a_0 & (m=0), \\
(-1)^m n \cdot \frac{(n+2m-2)!!}{(n-2m)!!} \cdot \frac{1}{(2m)!} a_0 & (2m \leq n), \\
0 & (2m > n)
\end{cases}

2m < n+2

\frac{n!!}{(n-6)!!} \quad \frac{n(n-2)(n-4)(n-6)(n-8)}{(n-6)(n-8)}
